ENFP.title: Social Butterfly
ENFP.desc: Your cat is a typical social butterfly, friendly to everyone, even more enthusiastic than you when guests visit. Needs lots of daily interaction, not suitable for long periods alone. The family's joy and best companion.
ENFP.quote: I'm not clingy, I just love this world too much
tips: Play more, at least 30 minutes of interaction daily
Not suitable for long alone time, easily depressed
Good for multi-cat households, needs companionship
Remember to greet it when guests come

INTJ.title: Cool Philosopher
INTJ.desc: Quietly observes, occasionally allows you to pet it. Has its own ideas, won't blindly obey. Seems aloof but actually thinking about cat life.
INTJ.quote: Don't bother me, I'm thinking about life
tips: Give it independent space, don't force hugs
Conquer it with intelligence, not food

ISFP.title: Clingy Little Spirit
ISFP.desc: Needs hugs 24/7, follows you even to the bathroom. Gentle and sensitive, full of artistic temperament. Can sense your emotions instantly.
ISFP.quote: Where you go, I go. Can't shake me off
tips: Hug it more, satisfy its security needs
Not suitable for long alone time
Treat it gently, it's very sensitive

ESTP.title: Demolition Director
ESTP.desc: Full of energy, destroys the house differently every day. Expert at opening doors and cabinets, no place it can't reach. Athletic champion, needs lots of activity.
ESTP.quote: In this house, there's nowhere I can't go
tips: At least 1 hour of interactive play daily
Consider cat walks to burn energy

INFJ.title: Healing Angel
INFJ.desc: Quiet companion, comes to comfort you when you're sad. Deep and mysterious, strong empathy. Best emotional support.
INFJ.quote: I understand your sadness, let me accompany you
tips: It can also sense your emotions

ENTP.title: Mischievous Trickster
ENTP.desc: Smart but loves to make trouble, expert at opening doors and cabinets. Full of curiosity, wants to try everything. House is never boring.
ENTP.quote: Just seeing if I can open this

ISTJ.title: Routine Veteran
ISTJ.desc: Eats and sleeps on time every day, unshakeable. Likes familiar environments and routines. Stable and reliable, never causes trouble.

ESFJ.title: Caring Little Jacket
ESFJ.desc: Always pays attention to your needs, actively pleases. Warm and friendly, likes everyone. The family's little sun.
ESFJ.quote: Do you need me? I'm always here

INTP.title: Independent Thinker
INTP.desc: Likes staying alone, thinking about problems. Not too clingy, but not aloof either. Has its own little world.
INTP.quote: Let me be alone for a while
tips: It will come find you when it wants to play

ESTJ.title: Dominant CEO
ESTJ.desc: Strong territorial awareness, it decides in the house. Warns when strangers approach. Strong protective instinct, family guardian.

ISFJ.title: Gentle Guardian
ISFJ.desc: Gentle and quiet, silently guards. Doesn't express much but is always there. Loyal and reliable, never leaves.
tips: It doesn't express but cares a lot

ENFJ.title: Natural Leader
ENFJ.desc: Born leader, core of multi-cat households. Good at coordinating relationships, caring for other cats. Responsible, strong protective instinct.
tips: It's the core of multi-cat households
Give it the status it deserves
It will also care for other cats

INFP.title: Dreamy Artist
INFP.desc: Sensitive and delicate, artistic temperament. Likes quiet corners, immersed in its own world. Gentle but has boundaries.

ESFP.title: Joy Maker
ESFP.desc: Lively and active, always full of energy. Likes to make you happy, family's joy. Friendly to everyone, never gets angry.

ISTP.title: Tech Geek
ISTP.desc: Likes researching things, how to open doors and cabinets. Strong hands-on skills, solves problems independently. Not too clingy but very smart.
ISTP.quote: Let me research how to open this

ENTJ.title: Strategist
ENTJ.desc: Clear goals, strong execution. Gets what it wants. Good at planning, family's strategist.
ENTJ.quote: What I want, I will get
tips: It has clear goals, don't stop it
